data.name: SyntaxNoUseDefaultValueDescription
data.value: do not use default brainfuck syntax values.

data.name: SyntaxIncrementPointerDescription
data.value: Increment the data pointer by one (to point to the next cell to the right).

data.name: SyntaxDecrementPointerDescription
data.value: Decrement the data pointer by one (to point to the next cell to the left).

data.name: SyntaxIncrementCurrentDescription
data.value: Increment the byte at the data pointer by one.

data.name: SyntaxDecrementCurrentDescription
data.value: Decrement the byte at the data pointer by one.

data.name: SyntaxOutputDescription
data.value: Output the byte at the data pointer.

data.name: SyntaxInputDescription
data.value: Accept one byte of input, storing its value in the byte at the data pointer.

data.name: SyntaxBeginDescription
data.value: If the byte at the data pointer is zero, then instead of moving the instruction pointer forward to the next command, jump it forward to the command after the matching ] command.

data.name: SyntaxEndDescription
data.value: If the byte at the data pointer is nonzero, then instead of moving the instruction pointer forward to the next command, jump it back to the command after the matching [ command.
